text:
50 PRs merged this week. We finally added a Z-axis—3D model generation is live via Trellis 2 and Rodin 2.5. The Community Models Alpha is officially rolling out, meaning more models hosted by more people. We also routed Flux to a self-hosted Vast.ai 5090 pool, shipped OAuth 2.1, and turned on app listing Quests so you can earn Pollen for building things. The Greenhouse is packed with 15+ new community apps. Code is open, as always. Check the repo to see what's new. 🐝✨

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #3dgeneration #openmodels #webdev
